titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Abandon Zakat Despite it Being Obligatory Upon Them
Chapter on Those Who Abandon Zakat Despite it Being Obligatory Upon Them

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «تَارِكُ اَلزَّكَاةِ وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَانِعِهَا وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ».
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «تَارِكُ اَلزَّكَاةِ وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَانِعِهَا وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ».

segments:
Hadith.1596 - Marwan ibn Muslim reported from Abdullah ibn Hilal, who said:
I heard Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) say:
"The one who neglects Zakat after it has become obligatory upon him is like the one who withholds it after it has become due."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1596 - Marwan ibn Muslim reported from Abdullah ibn Hilal, who said:
I heard Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) say:
"The one who neglects Zakat after it has become obligatory upon him is like the one who withholds it after it has become due."

narratorChain.raw: 1596 - وَ رَوَى مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ هِلاَلٍ قَالَ
